title: Subitems, Populating People from item
excerpt:
Hi, I using the subitems system I found need to populate people column from item: 

When assign people item, populate it for all their subitems.
When creating subitem, auto filled according assigner of related item.

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I using the subitems system I found need to populate people column from item:

  1. When assign people item, populate it for all their subitems.
  2. When creating subitem, auto filled according assigner of related item.

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml: 1. Populate subitem people column from Dropdown column.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kmk - at this time this is not possible in stock monday however there are a couple of apps out there that can fill the gap and set subitem columns based on thier parent values.

Check out Autoboost. It does have a free plan offering depending on your usage.

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mark.anley thanks for your tips, but it seem not work as you described, after it is installed, I set populate people column of item to people column of subitem when that subitem is created. It just nothing happened.

missionmonday1694×550 53.7 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kmk - that seems odd… Here is the email for the developer: apps@moveoboost.com. You should send them off an email so they can investigate.
Mark
